scripts.wasm:build: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build engine --target web --out-dir ../web/src/wasm --out-name ecto_engine
scripts.wasm:build:dev: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build engine --dev --target web --out-dir ../web/src/wasm --out-name ecto_engine
scripts.dev: npm run wasm:build:dev && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run wasm:build && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.reset-db: rm -f server/ecto.db server/ecto.db-shm server/ecto.db-wal && echo 'db cleared'
